specs.title: cp-000: PDF handout filename is title_handoutpdf
cp-001: PPTX export posts to apiexportpptx with JSON payload containing title themeConfi
cp-002: PPTX export filename is titlepptx un-sanitized title used directly
cp-003: PPTX export error is logged to console only PPTX export error
cp-004: Find input placeholder is Find
cp-005: Replace input placeholder is Replace with
cp-006: Find input auto-focuses on mount
cp-007: Dialog is positioned fixed top-16 right-4 not centered
cp-008: Enter key inside the dialog navigates to the next match
cp-009: ShiftEnter inside the dialog navigates to the previous match
cp-010: Match counter shows current of total when matches exist No matches when query ha
cp-011: Previous match button title is Previous match ShiftEnter
cp-012: Next match button title is Next match Enter
cp-013: Accessibility panel header includes a Re-check button that increments runId to f
cp-014: Zero-issue state shows green CheckCircle icon with text No accessibility issues
cp-015: Score is computed via calculateAccessibilityScoreissues separate from checkAcces
cp-016: Error severity section defaults to open warning and info sections default to clo
cp-017: Auto-fix for missing-alt-text navigates to slide selects the block and switches
cp-018: Auto-fix for low-contrast-text calls suggestAccessibleColortextColor backgroundC
cp-019: Auto-fix for low-contrast-primary calls suggestAccessibleColorprimaryColor backg
cp-020: Auto-fix for empty-slide adds a default text block type text data text Click to
cp-021: Auto-fixable rule IDs missing-alt-text missing-slide-title low-contrast-text low
cp-022: Default tone is keep_similar
cp-023: Dialog resets instruction tone submitting and error when closed
cp-024: Regeneration failure message is Regeneration failed The slide was left unchanged
cp-025: Dialog cannot be closed while submitting is true
cp-026: Submit label defaults to Regenerate passed from filmstrip
cp-027: apislidesregenerate validates with zod deckId positive int slideId positive int
cp-028: apislidesregenerate returns 400 with error details on validation failure
cp-029: apislidesregenerate returns 404 with error Deck not found when deck doesnt exist
cp-030: apislidesregenerate returns 404 with error Slide not found when slide doesnt exi
cp-031: apislidesregenerate returns 500 with error Slide regeneration failed on unexpect

cp-033: apislidesgenerate-image returns imageUrl attribution on success
cp-034: apislidesgenerate-image returns 500 with error Image generation failed on failur
